zh.lifeSummary: 當Francis Littlefield於1635年3月24日出生在英國哈普爾鐵費爾德時，他的父親Edmund Littlefield42歲，母親Annis Austin39歲。他於1656年與Meribah Wardell在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加普洛文斯 本 曼恩約克結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和4個女兒的父母。他於1653年住在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加普洛文斯 本 曼恩約克且於1668年住在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼威爾斯。他去世於1674年2月5日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼約克威爾斯享年38歲，埋葬在美國緬因州約克威爾斯。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Francis Littlefield于1635年3月24日出生在英国哈普爾鐵費爾德时，他的父亲Edmund Littlefield42岁，母亲Annis Austin39岁。他于1656年与Meribah Wardell在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加普洛文斯 本 曼恩約克结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和4个女儿的父母。他于1653年住在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加普洛文斯 本 曼恩約克且于1668年住在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼威爾斯。他去世于1674年2月5日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼約克威爾斯享年38岁，埋葬在美国缅因州約克威爾斯。

nameMeanings.name: Littlefield
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from Littlefield Green in White Waltham, Berkshire. The placename derives from Old English lȳtel ‘little’ + feld ‘open country’.

nameMeanings.name: Francis
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: equivalent of Italian Francesco , originally a vocabulary word meaning ‘French’ or ‘Frenchman’ (Late Latin Franciscus; compare Frank ). This was a nickname given to St Francis of Assisi ( 1181–1226 ) because of his wealthy father's business connections with France. His baptismal name was Giovanni . He had a pleasant, ordinary life as a child and young man, but after two serious illnesses, a period of military service, and a year as a prisoner of war in Perugia, he turned from the world and devoted himself to caring for the poor and sick. He was joined by groups of disciples, calling themselves ‘minor friars’ (friari minores). The main features of the Franciscan rule are humility, poverty, and love for all living creatures. The given name occurs occasionally in England as early as 1300 , and more frequently from the early 16th century, when there was a surge of admiration for, and imitation of, Italian Renaissance culture.

historicEvents.title: The English Civil War
historicEvents.description: A series of conflicts regarding England's governance during the years 1642 to 1651 is now known as The English Civil War. Charles I summoned supporters to join him against his enemies in Parliament. In October 1642, nearly 10,000 men fought for Charles I and chased Parliament across the River Tamar. Fighting continued for years and was finally ended at the Battle of Worcester on September 3, 1651, with a Parliamentarian victory.

Historical Boundaries: 1642: Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America 1653: Yorkshire, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America 1664: Maine, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America 1668: York, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America 1680: Massachusetts Claim, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America 1691: York, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America 1776: York, Massachusetts, United States 1820: York, Maine, United States

en.lifeSummary: When Francis Littlefield was born on 24 March 1635, in Titchfield, Hampshire, England, his father, Edmund Littlefield, was 42 and his mother, Annis Austin, was 39. He married Meribah Wardell in 1656, in York, Province of Maine, British Colonial America. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 4 daughters. He lived in York, Province of Maine, British Colonial America in 1653 and Wells, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America in 1668. He died on 5 February 1674, in Wells, York, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, at the age of 38, and was buried in Wells, York, Maine, United States.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Francis Littlefield est né le 24 mars 1635, à Titchfield, Hampshire, Angleterre, son père, Edmund Littlefield, avait 42 ans et sa mère, Annis Austin, avait 39 ans. Il a épousé Meribah Wardell en 1656, à York, Province of Maine, Amérique coloniale britannique. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 4 filles. Il a vécu à York, Province of Maine, Amérique coloniale britannique en 1653 et à Wells, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique en 1668. Il est décédé le 5 février 1674, à Wells, York, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique, à l’âge de 38 ans, et a été enterré à Wells, York, Maine, États-Unis.

de.lifeSummary: Als Francis Littlefield am 24. März 1635 in Titchfield, Hampshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Edmund Littlefield 42 und seine Mutter Annis Austin 39. Er hat 1656 in York, Province of Maine, British Colonial America Meribah Wardell geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 4 Töchter. 1653 hat er in York, Province of Maine, British Colonial America und 1668 in Wells, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America gelebt. Er starb am 5. Februar 1674 im Alter von 38 Jahren in Wells, York, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America und wurde in Wells, York, Maine, Vereinigte Staaten begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Francis Littlefield è nato il il 24 marzo 1635 nel Titchfield, Hampshire, England, il suo padre, Edmund Littlefield, aveva 42 anni e il suo madre, Annis Austin, aveva 39 anni. Lui sposato Meribah Wardell nel 1656, nel York, Province of Maine, British Colonial America. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 4 figlie. Vissuto a York, Province of Maine, British Colonial America nel 1653 e nel Wells, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America nel 1668. Morì il 5 febbraio 1674, nel Wells, York, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, all'età di 38 anni, e fu sepolto a Wells, York, Maine, Stati Uniti d'America.

ja.lifeSummary: Francis Littlefieldが1635年3月24日にイギリスハンプシュアイアティトチフィールドで生まれた時，父Edmund Littlefieldは42歳，母Annis Austinは39歳であった。1656年にイギリス植民地アメリカプロヴィンス オフ メインヨークでMeribah Wardellと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼は1653年にはイギリス植民地アメリカプロヴィンス オフ メインヨークに，1668年にはイギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニーウエルズに住んでいた。彼は1674年2月5日にイギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニーヨークウエルズで38歳で死去し，アメリカ合衆国メイン州ヨークウエルズにて埋葬された。

ko.Wells, York, Province of Maine, Massachu: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 웰스
ko.lifeSummary: Francis Littlefield(이)가 1635년 3월 24일 영국 함프실르 티트ch필드에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Edmund Littlefield(은)는 42세였고, 그의 어머니 Annis Austin(은)는 39세였다. 그는 1656년 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 프로빈스 프 맹 요르크에서 Meribah Wardell(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 1653년도에 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 프로빈스 프 맹 요르크에서, 1668년도에 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 웰스에서 살았다. 그는 1674년 2월 5일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 요르크 웰스에서 38세의 나이로 사망했으며 미국 메인 주 요르크 웰스에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Francis Littlefield nasceu em 24 de março de 1635, em Titchfield, Hampshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Edmund Littlefield, tinha 42 anos e sua mãe, Annis Austin, tinha 39 anos. Ele casou-se com Meribah Wardell em 1656, em York, Province of Maine, British Colonial America. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 4 filhas. Ele viveu em York, Province of Maine, British Colonial America em 1653 e em Wells, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America em 1668. Ele faleceu em 5 de fevereiro de 1674, em Wells, York, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, com 38 anos, e foi sepultado em Wells, York, Maine, Estados Unidos da América.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Francis Littlefield родился 24 марта 1635 г. в местности тичфиелд, хампшир, Англия, его отцу по имени Edmund Littlefield было 42 года, а матери, которую звали Annis Austin, 39. Он женился на женщине по имени Meribah Wardell в 1656 г. в местности ерк, провинц оф меин, бритиш колоняль амирика. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 4 дочери. Он жил в местности ерк, провинц оф меин, бритиш колоняль амирика в 1653 году и в местности веллс, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика в 1668 году. Он умер 5 февраля 1674 г. в местности веллс, ерк, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика в возрасте 38 лет и был похоронен в местности веллс, ерк, Мэн, Соединенные штаты.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Francis Littlefield nació el 24 de marzo de 1635, en Titchfield, Hampshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Edmund Littlefield, tenía 42 años y su mamá, Annis Austin, tenía 39 años. Se casó con Meribah Wardell en 1656, en York, Province of Maine, British Colonial America. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 4 hijas. Vivió en York, Province of Maine, British Colonial America en 1653 y en Wells, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America en 1668. Murió el 5 de febrero de 1674, en Wells, York, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, a la edad de 38 años, y fue sepultado en Wells, York, Maine, Estados Unidos.
